summary: Iteration 184: Bug Fix Verification - iOS Safari auSpelling crash and OAuth error handling. All frontend tests pass. Both critical bugs have been fixed and verified.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 404 - non-critical, chat feature may not be implemented

critical_code_review_comments: auSpelling.js fix verified: Fresh regex instances created per call (line 11-12) instead of module-level const with global flag - prevents iOS Safari 'Attempted to assign to readonly property' crash

OAuth error handling in App.js verified: AuthCallback now checks for error/error_description query params (lines 93-110) before processing session_id, with auto-retry up to 3 times before showing friendly error UI
Timeline tab loads without crash - auSpelling used on lines 533, 616 of TimelineEnhanced.jsx
Grounds tab loads without crash - auSpelling used on lines 369, 413, 421, 427 of GroundsOfMerit.jsx
Reports tab loads without crash - auSpelling used on line 352 of ReportView.jsx
Full report view loads correctly with Australian spelling applied (e.g., 'analysed' not 'analyzed')
Email/password login flow works correctly via POST /api/auth/login
Case detail page renders metadata correctly (state, offence, sentence)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 184 verified two critical bug fixes: (1) iOS Safari auSpelling.js crash - fixed by creating fresh regex instances per call instead of reusing module-level const regex with global flag, (2) OAuth 'Invalid state parameter' error handling - fixed by checking for error parameters in AuthCallback before processing session_id, with auto-retry and friendly error UI. Test case used: case_f65b65848793 (NSW Folbigg case with 1 document, 3 timeline events, 3 reports). All tabs (Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Reports) load without crash. Full report view displays correctly with Australian spelling applied.

ios_safari_auspelling_crash.description: Fixed iOS Safari 'Attempted to assign to readonly property' crash by creating fresh regex instances per call (line 11-12) instead of reusing module-level const regex with global flag
ios_safari_auspelling_crash.verification: Timeline, Grounds, and Reports tabs all load without crash

oauth_invalid_state_error.description: Added error parameter handling in AuthCallback (lines 93-110) to gracefully handle 'Invalid state parameter' OAuth errors with auto-retry and friendly error UI
oauth_invalid_state_error.verification: OAuth error URL triggers auto-retry redirect instead of showing raw JSON
